title: caladenia littoricola
intro: Caladenia littoricola, also known as the coastal spider orchid, is a species of orchid native to Western Australia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. Health benefits associated with Caladenia littoricola include its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal preparations such as infusions or tinctures, and is said to have been used by indigenous Australians for various medicinal purposes.
